title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A workflow that routes frontend development tasks to different models based on their strengths: Claude Opus for reasoning, planning, and integration decisions, and Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. The approach chains reasoning and code generation phases through handoff documents to produce better quality outputs at lower cost than using a single model.
